content: all things are good, it's been 2 years I am using this groww app, I've been investing, trading, there is no glitch or mistake about the transferring the money, but there is one thing, there will be a option in which we can make the wishlist of the stocks, but it has a limit of 10 wishlists, better lift that limit. it's a suggestion from my side

I am extremely disappointed with the Grow app. It is a stock broker, but when I added 100 rupees, I had a 20 rupee loss, which, due to the broker’s fault, escalated to an 800 rupee loss. They took my limit order and treated it as a market order, and the stop loss hit too quickly, even though the price hadn’t reached that point. I advise everyone not to trade on this app, because no matter how many limit orders you place, they get executed as market orders, and the stop loss hits instantly witho

Worst app for trading. You set the sell target at 100 with profit and it will automatically execute it at 95 and bear loss. you will set buy at 100 and it will automatically trigger at 105 again bear loss. Next if u set the buy at the limit then it will never execute your order and wait till dead.

​"Disappointed with the order execution speed. There is a consistent price gap of ₹2-₹3 between the price I order at and the price I get. This frequent slippage is directly causing bigger losses, and it has occurred around 5-6 times already. For option/intraday traders, this latency is unacceptable. Please fix this bug."

• Using Groww for 2+ years. • Frequent updates, but bugs never seem to end. • Chart prices and buy/sell prices often don't match. • Reinstalled the app and even changed devices, but the same issues persist. • Charts are sometimes inaccurate and unreliable. • Customer support is disappointing. • Support agents often ignore concerns and act as if they are always right. • Calls sometimes get disconnected without proper resolution.

Overall Groww had always been my best and I am sure no other platform can do it. BUT plz 1. Sometime after the App is been used constantly navigating back and forth i feel a lag. 2. Even time in punch in order on the same day I get call from 3rd party brokers asking me to take up the service, this is not random, exactly the day I punch in orders I start getting marketing calls from other platforms and unregistered 3rd party brokers. please check if my data is passed on without authorisation.

Some features are very much needed, which can make this app perfect : 1. The list of set GTT orders must be provided with sorting options too. 2. When we open a stock page , please indicate on the page itself whether an order is already active for that particular stock , otherwise the user has to search separately from among the orders. 3. There must be more options for sorting out in the watchlists, like according to their weekly high or low and traded volume etc.

Groww is one of the most beginner-friendly Android investment apps I’ve used. The interface is clean, SIP setup for mutual funds is simple, and buying stocks/ETFs is straightforward. Portfolio tracking across investments is convenient, and onboarding is mostly digital. The trade-off is that research tools and advanced trading features are not as deep as specialized trading platforms. For long-term investors and first-time users, it’s an excellent choice.
replyContent: Hi , we're really sorry for the inconvenience. Please email us at support@groww.in and share the ticket ID that gets generated. This will help us address your issue more quickly. Thanks for your patience!

content: Keeps sending stupid notifications constantly showing stocks in portfolio down or up by 2%, sometimes when they are not. Need to keep notifications on for the stock alerts I have put. Will edit the rating once this is resolved. Otherwise everything in the app is great.

This is not a good app for treading and investment in mutual funds. When I will redeem my amount in this app show a different amount and the amount credited in account is a loose making a different amount. when I call with the customer care service the agent tells you Show the amount on app it was a previous day amount and this is the real amount who will credit in your account. So, You will show in this application everything is false details.

Absolutely terrible trading app. The customer support is useless, the fees are unpredictable, and the app conveniently starts glitching right in the middle of trades. Every time there’s a chance to book profit, something suddenly stops working. It honestly feels like the platform is designed to make sure users never actually make money. And the worst part.. Their customer support somehow manages to make the whole experience even more frustrating.

Very disappointing experience. After using the external fund import feature, I started receiving unwanted OTPs, spam calls, and promotional messages. I tested this on two separate devices and faced the same issue both times. I do not have proof that these events are directly connected to the app, but the coincidence is difficult to ignore. For a platform that handles sensitive financial information, this creates serious concerns about privacy, security, and transparency. very disappointed 😞

Recent update of stocks should be included, as it's very useful for them who're not frequently updated for information or recent developments. Detailed development of particular stocks should regularly updated and easily accessible like quaterly results, changes in shareholding pattern, block deals or partnerships etc. Customer support is of very poor quality, they're not able to answer exactly what I was asking for.

I have used Groww for almost 4 years and traded F&O for 3 years. My concern is that the live P&L often seems delayed when a trade moves in my favor, while losses appear immediately. I have also faced repeated issues withdrawing funds when trying to stop trading, with messages saying my bank was not accepting the transaction. Customer support did not satisfactorily address my concerns. This review reflects my personal experience and has reduced my confidence in the platform.

Please use 1 lot as the default value. Currently, I noticed that if I buy 3 lots, then the next time I buy any Nifty option, it sets the lot size to 3 lots. Suggestions - A) Setting up multiple SL & TGT on the same trade is very non-intuitive. Hope the developer is simplifying it. B) Why can't we have a drag SL and TGT option when trading intraday stocks, like in NIFTY option trading?

I have been investing in mutual funds for the last year. A few months ago, I took a loan against my mutual fund through Groww. I borrowed 10k and repaid it within a week, but they charged more than 1.1k. They did not provide any proper document or report explaining the charges. When I tried calling their helpline, there was no response. They even charge fees for updating personal details. I'm not sure what other charges they may apply in the future.

good app for stocks and mutual funds. plz don't use it to buy Bonds. you dont get any service or reports to help track monthly payouts. you have to rely on your own bank statements and manual tracking and mailing. groww does not have any tracking report to help you. there are other apps with much better features and options for Bonds.

It's all good, but there are a few features missing here, you need to add them. It would be better if you add futures for chat analysis. There is a problem with this, the index chat does not show volume.

Not recommended in future and option, they executed your order higher amount than actual order. they charge alot in name of fees and other taxes Its really disappointed app. not recommended for options.
replyContent: Hey Mridula, thank you for sharing your feedback. We are working on adding some amazing features for your better experience. For further assistance you can raise an email on support@groww.in or you can call us on 9108800604. We will be happy to assist you.

content: Kindly show the sector in which the stock falls into when we open the stock name profile.. earlier it used to be a small label at the upper right corner. Please add that detail back.. or better still, Please provide a small Tab or button which gives Some information about the sector in which it falls into, what the company does, what's their moat, their compitition etc.. it would be very helpful if we have such information available at just a click..The app is doing Great work! keep it up !

The taxes and brokerage is costlier compared to Dhan and Zerodha but the smooth experience makes me forget that and it makes me wanting to stick with this app for trading but thee only thing which I fit is missing is 1) the trailing SL and target directly from charts(like the ones in Dhan app) which makes quite easier to trail both SL and target levels. 2) changing between stocks which are added your personal created wishlist from charts itself.

They charge too much! Almost zero profit. Not recommended! One more thing: You can't withdraw your money after crediting your groww account, unless you've have used that money to trade first, (suffer gain or loss) Only then you are allowed to withdraw. Simply put, your money is stuck the moment you transfer it there.

Not reliable for regular traders. It lags in the peak time and you can loss you huge money in the minutes. In my personal experience I was trying to close the trade or trying to convert it into delivery on 3:10 PM but due to error in the app I was not able to either close or extend it and has exit on its own not recommend at all.

i like this app I have been using it for 3 years . I will recommend some additional features to be added 1) introduce options of adjusting watchlist as per user preferred where to place before watchlist no.3 or watchlist no 6. 2) while creating alert please add option to add notes of 10 - 15 words or 50 alphabets

“You can add money anytime, but for withdrawals, you only allow it on Monday at 10 AM — what kind of rule is that? You take money whenever you want, but when it comes to withdrawals, users are forced to wait. This app is absolutely useless. My honest advice is to uninstall it. The service is completely terrible.”

Warning: Think twice before using Groww for Active Trading! 🛑 ​​"Don't use Groww for active trading or options. It's okay for long-term investment or just monitoring stocks, but for execution, it is very unreliable. The app lags almost 100% of the time during live trades, and the data is often inaccurate. Using it for trading is a sure way to lose your money due to technical errors. Stay safe and choose a better platform for trading."I have personally suffered a loss of over ₹10+ Lakhs..

yesterday I lost 4k because of App. Reason: when I am trying to navigate app got stuck for few seconds i tried clicking 2 or 3 times and after few seconds it got responded and result is my shares got soldout at 1 rupees lesser than market price... 1st of all as when sell window opens app chooses always lesser than market value don't why.... 2nd why you are selling below the market price even if user is selecting a price below market don't know why...

Bas app, be careful. Non supportive customer care. Maximum time number not connecting. Call cut down in between conversation if somehow connects. App frequently crashes. Today it crashed when I tried to exit from F&O and it doesn't load data. Throwback errors. Due to which I got into negative money and market closed and my money put on hold. Now, tomorrow is expiry and all premium will be cut out. I lost money. I am definitely uninstalling this app after collecting whatever left with me.

Very easy to use for investment in individual stocks and Mutual funds. But you will not get detailed information for any stock for analysis purpose like we get in a screener like app. Mutual fund details are there with their rankings. Their short term and long term performance can be tracked also. Another issue is Customer service number ( always busy) . And if I text my issue only to get a child like feedback from a person who does not clearly understand my main issue.

No one explains anything how to use this app. No call, no email no message just everywhere asks for investment/add money. This should only get 5* if they guide for a week at least. What about beginners. I don't want to give 1*...

don't trust portfolio, holding data , my actual portfolio is in loss but showing profitable. don't blindly buy or sell your stock , all value are mis calculated. groww developer team work on maths side. your niche is simplicity, don't make it complex . my stock avg price is 104 but after selling 50% share , my stock avg price show 87 now, they now averaging my price from share which is available in my portfolio not from overall, it create confusion.

Holding stock view sort options should include profit and loss in terms of amount high to low. After selling a stock its order history is not available in the stock interface as available while holding the stock. Order history should be there after selling the stock. App not working getting hangged. Unable to see holding section
After the latest update, the app isn't working properly. Today's high and today's low prices are showing incorrect data. Please fix this bug ASAP as it affects trading decisions...
replyContent: Hi, we’re so glad you’re enjoying Groww! We pour our heart into creating a seamless experience, and it means the world to hear your appreciation. Thanks for supporting us!

content: I receive notifications from Groww, but there is no option in the app to view all notifications in one place. Once the notification panel is cleared, all notifications are gone and cannot be accessed again. I request that you provide a feature in the app to view daily notifications or notification history

after the update of application you are not able to exit tour trade easily as application hang so much... daya by day application is going worse ...please any other different application....kindly do not trade in grow as there are so many bug issue comes while trading....

It's a very difficult app for an option trader while the limit orders execute in the market & GTT orders will execute far from the limit we set. SL is also the same, if we keep 10 points as SL it goes nearly 13 to 14 points & hits the SL. while coming to targets if we keep 20 points it will hit nearly 16 to 18 points. And the app does not provide any bracket orders, we can't set our targets & SL before the order activates, we only set the SL & Targets once the order activates.

very worst app . After settlement final price is changed. In my experience I book loss in future options position appz Rs 1450 in morning before 11 am. at night after settlement they deduct Rs 3829 . entry show 3829 loss for future options in transaction history. There customer support show as 24/7 but I try to connect then no one give response on call. There is no option to give Star ⭐ below 1 otherwise i will give him negative rating.
It's easy to trade in grow. There is some issue while buying and selling the order. Today, I bought a position It's market rate was 5.20 and grow bought me at 5.30. Highly disappointed.

one of the best, all the features are excellent.. only feedback is in the Option basket the strike from different weeks is not featured, it's allowing only same week. no other points .. the best.. Edit 17/04/26 after so many years of trading now I am growing 💗 very happy. Thank you team..

apart from being simple and easy to use it is the most useless app in terms of interface lagging problems I have lost so many trades due to its lagging interface after each update it jumps way ahead from the previous problem and gives me more headaches in between trading time. that's why I am planning to shift my trading app to zerodha again
replyContent: Hi, We would like to inform you, this was one time technical issue which has been fixed. We request you to refresh the app and try login. Thank you for your patience and understanding.

content: I can’t believe it — I set a sell price, but the order took too long to execute, and the final sell value was different. Sometimes it feels like there is cheating in exposure trading.

No stability. They change layout at will which affect trading flow. Fno section's layout has been changed which has made it more difficult and cluttered to execute trades on top of it it's glitchy. can't believe an app with do many subscribers can do such a poor job and can be so glitchy especially an app which deals with trading. when their customer care was approached the only answer they had was "sorry for inconvenience".

Groww UI is good and simple for new users. The app has introduced many updated features over time. However, I am giving 1 star because of poor customer support. Whenever you raise a ticket, customer support asks for the same information again and again. Repeating details 2–3 times is understandable, but asking for the same information 5+ times is frustrating. Additionally, representatives often do not answer the actual questions and instead provide random or irrelevant responses.

I will give it a 5 Star but I am not satisfied because of this i got this message from the groww app help team ( Currently, you cannot directly edit an existing SIP to change the amount. To increase your SIP amount from ₹300 to ₹600, you will need to cancel your current SIP and then create a new one with the desired amount of ₹600.) For a small request to the Groww team , if there is any chance on the next update.. Set edit option an existing SIP to change the amount increase or decrease option

Very bad app. Please dont invest in this as this is a fraud company. the make you invest in bonds for which the company will deduct tds but they dont deposit it also when you raise complain they will keep asking for your documents but wont do anything and when you ask about the complain they will again ask you for other document and if you dont provide any document they just got point and will say we cannot proceed further as you dont give this documents.

Very poor experience with Groww commodity trading. Chart candles lag and don’t match actual market price, leading to wrong entries. I placed trades based on support/candles, but price had already moved. Even after raising multiple complaints, there is no proper support or resolution. Not reliable for commodity trading.

Customer service is total waste. For the first time I called customer care, the support executive was not able to resolve the issue or rather I would say was not inclined to listen the query and resolve the issue. Also, very unprofessional tone. Didn't knew the process, also not ready to share details. Now the Groww is nunber ine broker in India. But if this sort of support continues, it's bound to go downhill from here. Totally disappointed.

In the holdings section, total shares, invested amount, total P&L in percentage, and day’s P&L in percentage should be shown, just like in Zerodha Kite. This essential information should be visible on a single screen, not after tapping or using filters. This is necessary to take appropriate action to exit from positions. Without this data, trading in Groww is not convenient.
The app is good overall. I miss absence of sorting option on stock name in trigger orders. A search option in trigger orders list would also help.
I have a very poor experience. Customer Support is pathetic. Experiencing technical glitches but no reliable support. The support team gives generic replies which is quite frustrating.

don't use it if you want your money to be safe..this app lags too much ,they charge High but app and it's customer support is pathetic..this app is not for traders you will lose your money if right time entry and exit will not work with app function... I am using both the mode webpage and mobile application

I purchased a few bonds few days back, some show in my holding the rest dont show, Customer support says any bonds purchased through NSE will not show in the holdings, this is a major drawback. Secondly any complaints registered through the APP do not show on the APP for a follow up. I have been a Zerodha user for long and unfortunately Grroww does not match my expectations . Groww needs to fix these issues on priority.

this is very best for all stock market investors and beginners but one option must be available in this app to avoid losses. "Auto Trial Stop Loss" option must be available in this app. then it will be the best app for all users. Thanks & Regards R. Prajapati (Groww User and SM investors)

please add stochastic indicator, which is very useful, when you are going to add stochastic indicator?? Please update why Grow not updating their chart with Stochastic Indicator I am chasing from last one year but still not taking any updates please do as soon as possible it's very good Indicator

compared to other apps to much expensive brokerage charged.. be alert and note. even we take one lot also taken high brokerage charges..be safe all. if you earn 1000 grow app share 400. finally you traded for grow app not for you .
replyContent: Hello , we regret the trouble you're facing. Could you email us at support@groww.in and provide the ticket ID? This will help us prioritize your issue and resolve it quickly. Thank you for your understanding!

content: Current update is not really good because the card of indexes like nifty 50 which were at the top, now they have been collapse which is not good for me. Every time if I wanted to see the nifty 50 like index I have to open it but before it was showing there just like other stocks.
The app is riddled with glitches and faults. Furthermore, they do not even answer the helpline number when needed. They also tamper with the account.

I've been using Groww since July 2020 and appreciated its simplicity for trading. However, the charts have become painfully slow, lagging during volatile markets and making timely decisions impossible. Sahi's super lightning ⚡ speed charts are a game-changer by comparison—snappy and reliable. Time to switch platforms. Groww, please fix the charts!

If we pledge our shares once and later unpledge them, we are being charged twice — once for pledging and once for unpledging. That itself is understandable, but the problem is that I have been charged multiple times even though I performed this action only once. After pledging and unpledging my shares one time, I did not perform any further pledge or unpledge transactions. However, I am still being charged repeatedly.

Scalping mode is not working properly after the update, if I want to change the index it is not changing. Not more features and functions. Chart not show proper candle. Scalping mode show only in android device not show in iOS version in iOS version chart not working properly. totally bad experience. I don't know why you here...😡😡😡

Please rollback to the previous stable version of the app immediately. The latest update has a critical bug where refreshing live data causes the app to crash completely. This issue is preventing me from execution and putting in my trades.

it's the worst, I was investing for like 13 months in two SIP's and cancelled one of them today but after doing this my dashboard is showing less than 50% of my invested amount. Before cancelling one of my SIP my dashboard showed 5000 something and now it's spinning only 1000 something. I wanted to raise this query on their helpline but their chatgpt isn't working and also whenever I try to call on their helpline number it always does it's busy. So if you love your money, keep it away from groww
Its service is very poor, I have been using it for the last 3 years but if a SIP gets started by mistake then they are saying that either I can stop it immediately or I can reduce the amount.

Dear Groww Tea, This is requested to you please ad an option in this app to switch account as of now every time I need to logout and again login this will reset all chart settings. so add a feature that just one click switch account and all settings remaining same for a user if he handle their family account.

Earlier there was only brokerage on selling now its on both, also everytime you purchase the share on same day of same company you need to pay brokerage. I am still invested but not happy with this initiative of Groww. It's been last two years I am using. Definetly it's easy to use, almost all features are there what you can expect.
suggestions in between browsing the shares is terrible. when I tried one share for delivery, after it became intraday. Those changes should have been notified to me. it's terrible experience.

FnO button flickering during order placing..seems highly suspicious and looks like engineered malfunction to skip or prevent user from placing sell orders at profit.....only happens when you are at profit not during loss!..raising the issue with sebi today! enough is enough Groww!
Customer service poor still not resolved my issue almost twice time connected and updated , but tried to avoid what is the issue and reading a script?

Hi team, recently you updated one feature right that's called F&O symbol and scalper options . see when I clicked position then screen is highlighted and moving rapidly and position does not close quickly. please resolve this issue as soon as possible
replyContent: Hi, we’re delighted that you’re enjoying Groww! Your support inspires us to keep working hard and delivering a great experience. Thank you so much for choosing us!

content: This my first experience in options trading, i am doing better in options trading but I can't book my profit otherwise the app is outstanding, mind-blowing
Charges unnecessary hidden charges. Does not offer free online Closure and transfer service. Should not be downloaded. Worst app for trading. Does not care about customers.

why did you removed news section from app , it was very helpful insight section , uninstalling the app soon , if that news section is not back , grow digest is useless to work with and waste of time also.
So many lags and errors in showing real-time trades info of sellers and buyers. Can't trade properly due to improper content.
facing problem while opening the nifty sensex chart when I click on the amount exit option continuously keeps on shivering and by which I always exited at wrong move. kindly do something on it.
Current update is worst...The app flicker constantly and I can't exit the trade i have taken. Shortcut exit from position.

this is the most worst app in the world for trading.I am withdrawing my money from morning I have tried atleast 10 to 15 times and I have not received my money.I suggested this app is worst trading platform in the world. when you buy the stocks in groww it buys at high even though the price is not moved that much and when you sell the stocks the same experience I have experience from past 2 months and this is completely manipulating the entry and exit price

I am not the one who usually give review to a app but this app it totally fantabulous, so easy to understand, even though beginners can easily trade on it, I recommend this app to everyone no matter the person is beginner or pro

Very snappy UX. One major issue is for some stocks it selects MTF by default instead of Delivery. Major flaw and should be fixed ASAP Another issue is the portfolio view resets to default if the app is minimised for a few seconds.

after update there's no option for nifty I am not able to change from sensex to nifty in scalping mode and also before update there's were all 50 company list together in overview now it is not showing it was good experience earlier before update but now can't say the same

please make this for tablet user also beacause it is not align with tablet UI. Also when i draw something on chart in a device not showing in another device means your app is not synced.

After updating application buy and sell options not working properly on when some chart open like ce or pe and then from bottom we have selected position to buy or sell that time quick buy sell options not working

worst app I suffered losses rs 4000 because of Auto exit if auto exit is not exist then I earn more than 5000 rs that day this is not a first time and The stock you are looking at to trade is not available for trade. I recommend to use another broker apk

I have been using Groww since February 2022, and my investment journey began on this platform. I also opened my first Demat Account through Groww. The app has a very simple, clean, and user-friendly interface, which makes it easy for new investors to start investing. My experience investing in stocks, mutual funds, and IPOs has been excellent. Even today, Groww remains one of my favorite investment apps. I would definitely recommend it to anyone who is new to investing. ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
Hii groww, it's a great app but I have found bug problem during my app settings . how to solve the problem. please give some feedback.
Very easy to use for investment in individual stocks and Mutual funds. But you will not get detailed info...
bad experience. orders auto triggered even when price is near but not engaged with your limit price and no clear answers from support.
don't prefer this trading app. chart is slow,takes too much time to open the chart.

One of the best trading apps for beginners, and now equally great for professional traders. The 1-Tap Trading feature makes execution much faster and smoother. Overall, the experience has been excellent, and I highly recommend this app to everyone. My only request is to please launch the 1-Tap Trading feature for iOS users as well. It would make the app even better.

The basket mode only supports multiple options for one expiry date. Baskets should support multiple expiry dates. Also nifty and BANKNIFTY futures should be in the same basket along with their respective options. This will help against losses when options and futures are opened separately
Grow chart interface is smooth and fast, but they should also add quarterly, half yearly and yearly timeframe candles.
Decent app but really bad support. AI agents are useless and human agents are not informative enough. Response comes in ages.
in trading there are many problems in live tracking and placing orders, limit orders are already kept at market price why , we need to delete then write then place, so hectic
it's very simple to use and gives all the relevant data of Equity, all AMC's MF, F&O etc. Hence I strongly recommend to use this app for your saving's multiplication. regards
I absolutely love this app and its UI. The portfolio analysis system needs to be improved. It needs to calculate values and show visual representations more accurately and in a better way.
replyContent: Hi, we’re delighted that you’re enjoying Groww! Your support inspires us to keep working hard and delivering a great experience. Thank you so much for choosing us!

content: I’m disappointed with the Groww app and the support I received. Several times my orders were auto-executed or auto-cancelled without a clear reason, which caused confusion and potential financial loss. When I contacted customer service, the team was unable to resolve the issue and often used a rude, unhelpful tone. The inconsistent order behaviour combined with poor support makes the app unreliable for trading.

Interface is good, but entry point is manipulated by them in buying and selling never enter without mentioning exact price other wise app will give you whatever is worst possible entry point. Brokerage charges will bite. App lags a lot.

i don't know what happened but the app is showing ``your journey is in reset process '' . This is my first time of using a trade app and showing this from the start.... I haven't even started my journey.... Not to raise complain but to reach your concern..... kindly rectify the issue

Worst app showing different prices for the same time in options.While compared with Angel one it is showing 70 rupees whereas at the same time groww is showing 55 rupees. Why this price difference due to this so many losing money.Also the order executions are not executed at same price. It is executing different price which you set the target.

Groww customer call service is pathetic nobody is take your query calls and there is a an issue as well in this application because unable to raise 2 or more query tickets. It shows ticket raised but the actual ticket is not showed anywhere in this application.
replyContent: Hi, could you please help us with your registered email id/mobile number/ticket id, since we are unable to fetch your information. Else you can also write us back with your registered email to support@groww.in, we'll be glad to assist you further.

content: very poor customer service - unable to address customer queries. just cut paste response. security is a big concern. your portfolio gets accessed by their other company without any check response to issues raised take a lot of time and follow ups

Groww is one of the best trading and investing apps I’ve used. The interface is clean, beginner-friendly, and very smooth to navigate. Opening stocks, mutual funds, SIPs, and even F&O trading is simple and fast. I also like how transparent the app feels with charges and portfolio tracking. Customer support and updates have improved a lot too. Great app for both beginners and experienced investors. Highly recommended!

Pathetic app with totally useless customer service. They could not do the onboarding even after almost a week, always blaming the bank and everything but themselves. Imagine how bad they will be during actual use! Deleted data, closed account and uninstalled. Suggest you do the same.

One of the best apps to Support the budding or new investor who enters into the market for the first time. They have all the fundamentals you should know for investing at a very convenient place. Their charts show exactly what you want to see and provide you a crisp outline of data with events and News which are up to date to support your investment ideas. Overall i am having a wonderful experience in Grow and one more Fee is also comparatively low in the investor point of view.
beginner's friendly, easy to use, Familiar Environment and easy to Track portfolio. Best Broker for beginners.

Dear Groww Team, It’s appreciated that you regularly bring updates and improvements to the app. However, in the recent update, the size of the Nifty 50 and Sensex view options have been reduced. Kindly make those buttons/options slightly bigger and easier to click, as they are important features that users access frequently. A larger and more visible touch area would improve the overall user experience. Thank you.

Never use this application if you face any problem then customer care not support properly and they delay to take call if this call disconnected they do not call back to you. And their charge is high from other plate from. So don't use grow application for trading.
Good features,Tracking my portfolio is very easy, and there are no hidden charges. It feels very secure and reliable. If you're looking to start your investment journey, this is the app to go for..!

Dark pattern - showed me "activate F&O " interstitial with the options pre selected, just after opening the app. Usually in its place, there is some informative banner that you're just accustomed to dismissing at a click. Did not expect this from Groww.

Key Missing Feature: 2-Leg Orders in Delivery & GTT Groww is great, but lacks 2-leg orders (SL + target) for Delivery & GTT Buy/Sell—available only in Intraday. Busy users miss out on automated exits for long-term trades. Also add Disclosed Quantity option.

content: I am very disappointed with Groww. The platform charges high fees on almost every transaction, whether the investment amount is small or large. There also appear to be extra or hidden charges, making it costly for investors. These high costs reduce overall returns and make the experience frustrating. Groww should improve transparency and lower its charges to support small investors. Currently, it does not feel user-friendly or affordable.

Please add a toggle to hide F&O and Loan tabs. I am strictly a long-term stock/MF investor, but your cluttered UI caused me to accidentally activate the high-risk F&O segment via a misclick. Investors need the autonomy to customize their dashboard based on their investing style. Letting us hide unused tabs would clean up the visual space and prevent expensive accidental errors. Please prioritize this UI/UX fix!
